name: Sunday Night Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups White Lily or cake flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until light and add the sugar slowly, beating well after each addition.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition until the mixture is fluffy.
3. Sift together the dry ingredients and fold into the batter in three parts.
4. Alternately add milk to the batter in two parts, stirring in the vanilla extract.
5. Pour the batter into prepared pans and bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or until the layers are golden brown and pull away from the edges of the pans.
6. Let cool about 10 minutes before turning out onto a rack.
7. To ice, place a cooled layer on a serving plate. Cover with about one fifth of the Chocolate Icing.
8. Place the second layer on top and spread it with another one fifth of the icing.
9. Top with the third layer and use the remaining icing to cover the top and sides. If the icing does not spread evenly or smoothly, dip the blade of the icing knife in warm water as you ice the cake.
